title: Endurance with Progressive Finale
description: Negative split pacing, marathon ride prep
purpose: Negative split pacing, marathon ride prep

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/1. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 75%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 6% complete. 80 minutes left. Zone 2 is like compound interest — boring but effective.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 65% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60:00 at 65%. Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 60:00 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 60:00 at 65-65%. Relax your grip. Drop your shoulders. Smooth pedaling.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 46% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 50 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 46% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 46% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 46% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 66% done. 2 intervals left. 30 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 66% complete. Rep 3/5. 82% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 3/5. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 2 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 66% done. 2 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 3. 2 to go. 30 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/5. 80% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 4. 110min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 120 minutes of work done. 20 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 80% done. 1 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 100% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 10:00 at 100%. Then 10min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 10min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 100% × 10:00. Give it everything. 10min cooldown coming.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 140 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 130min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 140 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 93% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
